name: stitch-skills
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        google-labs-code /

      stitch-skills  

    
      A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.
summary: 这是一个专为Stitch MCP服务器设计的智能体技能库，遵循开放标准，可与多种主流编程智能体无缝集成，值得关注因为它提供了标准化的技能开发框架。

name: meshoptimizer
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        zeux /

      meshoptimizer  

    
      Mesh optimization library that makes meshes smaller and faster to render
summary: 这是一个用于优化网格的C++库，能缩小网格体积并提升渲染效率，值得关注因为它能显著优化3D图形性能。

name: wonderwhy-er
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        wonderwhy-er /

      DesktopCommanderMCP  

    
      This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities
summary: 该项目为Claude开发了MCP服务器，使其具备终端控制、文件系统搜索和差异文件编辑能力，值得关注因为它极大扩展了AI助手对开发环境的操作权限。

name: next.js
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        vercel /

      next.js  

    
      The React Framework
summary: Next.js 是基于 React 的全栈框架，提供开箱即用的服务端渲染和静态站点生成功能，因其高性能和开发者友好特性成为现代 Web 开发的首选方案。

name: DayuanJiang
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        DayuanJiang /

      next-ai-draw-io  

    
      A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.
summary: 这是一个集成AI能力的在线绘图工具，能通过自然语言指令创建和修改图表，值得关注因为它实现了智能化的图表交互设计。

name: pgrust
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        malisper /

      pgrust  

    
      Postgres rewritten in Rust, now passing 100% of the Postgres regression tests
summary: 该项目是用 Rust 语言重写的 PostgreSQL 数据库，现已通过全部回归测试，因其高性能与内存安全特性值得关注。

name: fprime
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        nasa /

      fprime  

    
      F´ - A flight software and embedded systems framework
summary: F´是NASA开发的飞行软件与嵌入式系统框架，专为航天任务提供可靠高效的C++解决方案，值得关注因其开源特性及在航空航天领域的权威实践。

name: bun
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        oven-sh /

      bun  

    
      Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one
summary: Bun 是一个集 JavaScript 运行时、打包工具、测试运行器和包管理器于一体的全能工具，凭借其卓越的性能和一体化设计大幅提升了开发效率。
